g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how students apply to Ailes Scholars')
sendPrompt('What makes a student eligible for listing?')
sendPrompt('How does a student receive their funding?')
sendPrompt('How does the Ailes Scholars platform work?')
sendPrompt('Who are the donors and sponsors on Ailes Scholars?')
sendPrompt('How do corporate sponsors benefit from Ailes Scholars?')
sendPrompt('How does Ailes Scholars make money?')
